provenance.source_name: HRSA HPSA facility detail files (Primary Care, Dental Health, Mental Health)
provenance.rollup_method: Filter each HRSA discipline CSV to Common State Abbreviation='MI' and HPSA Status='Designated', then group by Common State County FIPS Code. Per (county, discipline): designatedHpsas=count of designations; maxHpsaScore=max HPSA Score across designations; designationPopulation=sum of HPSA Designation Population; estimatedUnderservedPopulation=sum of HPSA Estimated Underserved Population; providerFte=sum of HPSA FTE; shortageFte=sum of HPSA Shortage. Counties with zero designated HPSAs render as 0/null, not missing.
provenance.notes: HRSA HPSAs are typically sub-county (census tract, population group, or facility). HRSA does not publish a county summary as a separate artifact, so this rollup is a MODELED aggregation from designation records. HPSA Score is 0-25 for Primary Care and Dental (0-26 for Mental Health); higher = more severe shortage. providerFte + shortageFte together approximate the local supply gap.
